results.title: Election Results: Haaland leading Bregman in race for governor nomination
results.description: Vote tallies are unofficial until canvassed in a special meeting by a county commission where the ballots were collected. The post Election Results: Haaland leading Bregman in race for governor nomination appeared first on Artesia Daily Press .
